source_pr.title: planner: fix the unstable test case TestListPartitionOrderLimit
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #26796 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: planner: fix the unstable test case TestListPartitionOrderLimit

### What is changed and how it works?

To make the test query `select * from t order by c limit 5` stable, values on `c` cannot be duplicated.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

planner: fix the unstable test case TestListPartitionOrderLimit

symptoms: planner: fix the unstable test case TestListPartitionOrderLimit
failure_signature: planner: fix the unstable test case TestListPartitionOrderLimit
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: planner: fix the unstable test case TestListPartitionOrderLimit.
fix_pattern: planner: fix the unstable test case TestListPartitionOrderLimit

evidence: evidence: planner: fix the unstable test case TestListPartitionOrderLimit
